name: pagespeed-bulk-scanner
description: Optional PDF-export engine for the PageSpeed Bulk Scanner. Driven by pagespeed_scanner.php; renders the finished HTML report to PDF via headless Chromium (Playwright). The scan itself is pure PHP and needs none of this.

scripts.postinstall: echo '\nNext (only needed for PDF export): install the browser engine ->  npx playwright install chromium\n'
